patch.value: Net-new config UX surface for key discovery and automation-friendly export without changing existing get/set behavior.
Config key discovery and export actions
Add pm config list/export actions so operators and agents can discover supported keys and retrieve one-shot resolved snapshots.
pm config supports list and export actions with deterministic output across project/global scopes and full contracts/docs/tests parity.
Lower maintenance overhead for agents and scripts
Config keys and values can be discovered/exported in one call
Current config UX requires hardcoding keys and repetitive calls
